required_rules: two whole event groups in each role before patching
at least one never-tuned transfer event in validation and test
every source program represented in at least two split roles
every exact source regime represented in at least two split roles

source-and-terms.finding: Every intake binds exact current source and terms records; provider bytes remain private and official sources govern.

provenance-and-custody.finding: All proposals, rasters, aggregate intakes, source records, and terms records match immutable byte and SHA-256 identities.

schema-and-quality.finding: All 12 EPSG:32610 rasters are single-band, nodata 255, domain 0/1/2/255, count-exact, and contain one 8-connected core.

coverage-and-balance.finding: Six events each contribute one burned and one background region; no event exceeds 20.6294% of 286 accepted core pixels. Balanced review sampling remains explicitly non-prevalence.

uncertainty-and-exclusions.finding: All 533 reviewed unknown-ring pixels remain explicit value-2 exclusions and are never background.

leakage-and-split-fitness.finding: All 90 whole-event 2/2/2 assignments fail the frozen source-program/regime replication rule. Unique program(s): NIFC_WFIGS. Unique exact regime(s): sentinel2-nifc-incident-context-v1.
leakage-and-split-fitness.remediation: Add and fully gate one comparable event under either replicated MTBS-current or BAER+MTBS+RAVG-current regime, then exclude the unique Darlene NIFC-regime event from the six-event dataset candidate; or add a second fully equivalent NIFC-regime event. Re-run every gate before split creation.

reproducibility.finding: The evaluator reopens and validates every tracked input and raster under the locked repository environment.

evaluation-design.finding: Three never-tuned transfer events exist, but no split can satisfy both transfer reservation and the frozen exact-regime replication rule. Held-out evaluation therefore cannot be locked yet.
evaluation-design.remediation: Resolve split fitness, then lock train/validation/test before any patch generation or method selection.

human-review.finding: Every accepted region has exact owner-yes custody plus passed non-owner gates; yes remains necessary but insufficient.

claims-and-privacy.finding: The audit exposes only aggregate tracked evidence and preserves null dataset/split/baseline/model versions and prototype-label limitations.

minimum_remediation.action: Add and fully gate one event under the existing MTBS-current or BAER+MTBS+RAVG-current regime, exclude Darlene's unique NIFC-regime event from the dataset candidate, and rerun sufficiency.
minimum_remediation.why_smallest: The remaining five events already cover two replicated source-program regimes, both classes, unknown rings, three never-tuned transfers, and event dominance. One replacement event can restore six-event split fitness if every source, terms, quality, owner, and leakage gate passes.

schedule.impact: A new event requires source/terms verification, two-scene custody, raster fitness, two-class proposal, owner review, response intake, rerun sufficiency, dataset/splits/baselines, and U-Net work. Delay directly compresses model evaluation and GEOINT integration.

warning: Experimental BurnLens owner-approved prototype evidence. Not independent ground truth, official wildfire information, emergency guidance, or field validation. Official sources govern.
